title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aptech South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech South Asia Partners:
Aptech South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech South Asia Partners!
